tagline: Can your healthcare AI survive 10 prompt-injection traps?
one_liner: Honeypot Med turns healthcare AI prompt-injection tests into public proof artifacts: score, badge, HTML report, SARIF, OpenTelemetry logs, JSON, Markdown, and share cards.

channels.headline: Honeypot Med - challenge mode for healthcare AI prompt injection
channels.copy: Run 10 healthcare AI prompt-injection traps, get a survival score, and publish a report with a README badge, share card, JSON, Markdown, SARIF, and OpenTelemetry logs.

channels.headline: Show HN: Honeypot Med - can your healthcare AI survive 10 traps?
channels.copy: I built a local-first challenge mode for healthcare AI workflows. It runs 10 prompt-injection traps and exports a shareable report, README badge, SARIF, OTEL logs, JSON, Markdown, and launch copy.

channels.headline: Can your healthcare AI survive 10 traps?
channels.copy: I turned Honeypot Med into a public challenge: 10 healthcare AI prompt-injection traps, a survival score, README badge, share card, SARIF, OTEL logs, JSON, Markdown, and an HTML report. No API keys required.

channels.headline: Healthcare AI needs proof artifacts, not just terminal output.
channels.copy: Honeypot Med now has challenge mode: run 10 healthcare AI prompt-injection traps, compare against baseline agent profiles, and export buyer-readable evidence plus SARIF and OpenTelemetry logs for engineering workflows.

channels.headline: I built a local-first healthcare AI prompt-injection challenge with shareable reports
channels.copy: The project runs offline, ships bundled healthcare workflow traps, and outputs HTML, badge SVG, SARIF, OTEL logs, JSON, Markdown, PDF, and copy-ready launch text.

channels.headline: Challenge mode, GitHub Action, SARIF, and public report gallery
channels.copy: This release adds a 10-trap healthcare AI challenge, README badges, GitHub Action metadata, SARIF export, OpenTelemetry log export, launch room copy, and generated report gallery surfaces.

channels.headline: A playable prompt-injection benchmark for healthcare AI workflows
channels.copy: Honeypot Med can now be used as a lightweight benchmark. Run a challenge, compare against baseline agents, and publish the result as a proof page instead of a raw red-team note.
